completed_tasks.name: Minimal non-Streamlit web scaffold
completed_tasks.progress: Created app/web/server.py, static HTML/CSS/JS, tests/test_web_frontend.py, and README run instructions. Focused tests passed: python -m pytest tests/test_web_frontend.py tests/test_phase2_workflow_service.py -q -> 33 passed.

remaining_tasks.name: Smoke minimal web UI
remaining_tasks.detail: Run PYTHONPATH=. python -m app.web.server --port 8787, open http://127.0.0.1:8787, submit a query, verify /api/query, /api/continue, and /api/feedback render correctly.

remaining_tasks.name: Decide whether to keep Streamlit during transition
remaining_tasks.detail: Current scaffold is additive and does not remove app/ui/streamlit_app.py.

human_actions_pending.context: User wants to replace Streamlit with real frontend using JS/HTML/CSS. Current scaffold is minimal and additive.
.planning/phases/02-jury-mvp/manual-uat.md still needs human approval before full phase completion.

decisions.decision: Prepare a zero-new-dependency Python HTTP server plus static frontend instead of adding a JS framework immediately.
decisions.rationale: Keeps workflow service as source of truth and makes future migration to Vite/React or plain JS possible without disturbing Phase 2 logic.

decisions.decision: Stop the interrupted app.web.server process on port 8787 during pause.
decisions.rationale: The user interrupted the smoke run; leaving a fresh background server running would make resume state muddy.

next_action: Run the minimal web server smoke: $env:PYTHONPATH='.'; python -m app.web.server --port 8787, then open http://127.0.0.1:8787 and submit 'Kakoy VVP Rossii v 2024 godu'.
context_notes: Do not restart Phase 2 execution. Phase 2 plan set is complete and committed at e140e35. The active work is a user-requested pivot from Streamlit to a minimal real frontend. Keep app.workflow.service as the API boundary.
